paragraph:
Velmoria, a decade on
The republic endures, and refuses to (condone) the comforts of forgetting
LET THIS chapter not (gripe) but take stock. Ten years now since the marshal toppled from his (throne), and Velmoria has reached a (milestone) it once seemed unable to (endure): a full decade of self-rule, unbroken. The republic has not become a (utopia)—no honest citizen would (condone) such a claim—but it has, against every (dire) prediction, proved (secure) enough to last.
The anniversary was marked with restraint. There was a modest (fanfare) in the (square), a single (spire) of fireworks against the dusk, and then quiet. The state has learned to distrust spectacle. Under the marshal every triumph came wrapped in (bizarre), (macabre) pageantry—a (cyclone) of (rhinestone) glitter over a hollow (limestone) shell. His successors prefer the plain (timbre) of ordinary life, and the (composure) of a people no longer asked to (revere) anyone.
To mark the day, the national museum opened a new wing—part archive, part (caricature) gallery, part sober record. Through it the visitor moves as if through a (kaleidoscope) of the nation's recent past: a faded (daguerreotype) of the old capital; the (prototype) of the marshal's never-built monument; a cracked (stethoscope) and rusted (microscope) from the clinics he let rot; an (isotope) badge from the sham "research" institute that was really a (sinecure) for cronies. The curators refuse to (obscure) the ugliness or (immure) it behind glass and reverence. They will not let memory (expire).
The marshal himself is rendered without (lore) or legend—no heroic (archetype), no (vampire) of melodrama, just a man who (conspire)d, (perjure)d, and (deplore)d nothing he did. A wall of testimony records the (massacre)s his decrees made (airborne) as rumour and then real. Beside it hangs a single (ligature), a relic of the torture chambers, displayed without comment. The (exposure) is deliberate, even when it risks (overexposure); the planners would rather (scare) the young into vigilance than (lure) them with a (demure), sanitised tale.
It would be easy, a decade on, to grow (jejune) and complacent. Some do. A (misanthrope) faction grumbles that freedom is a (chore), that the old order was more (opportune), that strong rule would (ensure) what messy democracy cannot. A (doctrinaire) populist tours the (dune)-fringed provinces promising to (immure) his critics and (abjure) the constitution; he would gladly (interlope) on the courts and (perjure) the record to (secure) power. His rhetoric is all (satire) and (ire), a (heliotrope) turning always toward whatever crowd will (adore) him.
The republic answers him not with a rival (umpire)'s whistle but with the slow (anodyne) of competence. Roads are built; the (manure) reaches the fields; the (biosphere) of the poisoned river recovers, fish and (roe) returning to waters once dead. The land is again (shipshape): a farmer drives his (mare) past terraced (limestone) walls; a child runs (agape) along the (cape) where the marshal's phantom (armada) once moored. These are the true (touchstone)s of recovery—humble, durable, hard to (caricature).
There remain (sere) and barren patches the decade has not healed. Trust, once broken, is slow to (atone) for itself. The wounded do not always find (closure); grief does not (attune) itself to anniversaries. Some survivors still (mire) in the past, unable to (scrape) free of it, and the state does not (importune) them to "move on." It offers instead the dignity of being believed—a kind of (cynosure) for the bereaved, a fixed point of acknowledged truth.
Institutions, too, must be guarded. A free press is the republic's clearest (microscope) on power, its surest (stethoscope) on the body politic; let it (expire) and the (monotone) hum of propaganda returns. The courts must keep their (tenure) (secure) and their (composure) under pressure. No office may become a (sinecure), no record a forgery, no leader a (cyclone) gathering all power to a single (throne). The lesson of the marshal is engraved now in the national (lore): that a republic is not a (cape)stone laid once and forgotten, but a wall rebuilt daily, stone by stone.
So Velmoria does not (aspire) to grandeur. It aims only to (endure)—to remain (secure), (humane), and free; to (revere) no man and (condone) no tyrant; to keep the past in clear (exposure) so the future need not repeat it. The marshal sought a (throne) and won a (saga) of ruin. His country, a decade past his fall, has chosen the plainer, harder, more (anodyne) thing: an ordinary freedom, modestly kept, that no (fanfare) can inflate and no (misanthrope) can talk away.
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -ure 家族大集结：tenure/erasure/closure/enclosure/composure/exposure/caricature/ligature，全来自拉丁 -ura 表示行为/状态/结果的名词后缀

• sinecure：sine（无，拉丁）+ cura（照料），"无需照料的职务"=闲职；cure（治疗）/curator（策展人）同根

• cynosure：Cynosura（希腊"小熊座"），北极星是航海指引，cynosure=引人注目的中心人物/事物

• atone：at+one，"变为一体"=弥补赎罪，atonement=使双方变为一体；at one的词源故事

• aspire/conspire/expire：全来自拉丁 spirare（呼吸），aspire=向上呼吸=渴望，conspire=共同呼吸=密谋，expire=呼气完毕=到期死亡

• misanthrope：misos（恨）+ anthropos（人），厌世者，philanthropy（慈善=爱人）正好相反

• heliotrope：helios（太阳）+ tropos（转向），向日葵=朝向太阳转，太阳花也叫 heliotrope

• lucre：拉丁 lucrum（利润），filthy lucre=肮脏的钱财，St. Paul在圣经中使用此词批评贪财

quiz.question: condone __________
quiz.explanation: 宽恕，宽恕腐败。The committee refused to condone corruption. 委员会拒绝宽恕腐败。 | con->共同，don->给予（拉丁donare），condone->共同给予宽容=宽恕（cf. donate捐赠，donor捐赠者，pardon原谅，condone容忍）

quiz.question: ________ cyclone
quiz.explanation: 飓风，热带飓风。A tropical cyclone approached the coast. 热带飓风接近海岸。 | kyklos->圆（希腊），cyclone->旋转的圆=气旋（cf. cycle循环，cyclic循环的，bicycle自行车，encyclopedia百科全书）

quiz.question: _____ throne
quiz.explanation: 王座，皇家王座。The king sat on the royal throne. 国王坐在皇家王座上。 | thronos->宝座（希腊），throne->君主的座位（cf. throne宝座，enthrone加冕，dethrone废黜，throttle阀门=座位控制器）

quiz.question: atone ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 赎罪，为罪孽赎罪。He sought to atone for sins. 他试图为罪孽赎罪。 | at+one，atone->变为一体=弥补（词源是at one，使双方重新合一=赎罪，cf. atonement赎罪，reconcile和解）

quiz.question: _______ monotone
quiz.explanation: 单调，单调的低沉声音。His droning monotone put people to sleep. 他单调的低沉声音让人昏昏欲睡。 | mono->单一，tone->音调（希腊tonos），monotone->单一音调（cf. monotonous单调，monotony单调，tone音调，semitone半音）

quiz.question: ______ milestone
quiz.explanation: 里程碑，职业里程碑。Getting promoted was a career milestone. 获得晋升是职业里程碑。 | mile->英里（拉丁mille->千），stone->石，milestone->标注英里的石头=里程碑（cf. milestone里程碑，mileage里程，millimeter毫米）

quiz.question: limestone ____
quiz.explanation: 石灰石，石灰石洞穴。The limestone cave had stalactites. 石灰石洞穴有钟乳石。 | lime->石灰（古英语lim），stone->石，limestone->石灰石（cf. lime石灰，limelight聚光灯=石灰光，calcite方解石=石灰同根）

quiz.question: rhinestone ________
quiz.explanation: 人造钻石，人造钻石项链。She wore a rhinestone necklace. 她戴着人造钻石项链。 | Rhein->莱茵河（德语），stone->石，rhinestone->莱茵河边产的晶体=人造钻石（cf. Rhine莱茵河，Germany德国，crystals水晶）

quiz.question: ____ touchstone
quiz.explanation: 试金石，酸试金石。The acid touchstone tested gold purity. 酸试金石测试黄金纯度。 | touch->触摸/测试，stone->石，touchstone->用来测试黄金纯度的黑色石头（cf. touch触摸，benchmark基准，criterion标准）

quiz.question: airborne _________
quiz.explanation: 空气传播的，空气传播的颗粒。Airborne particles can cause allergies. 空气传播的颗粒会引起过敏。 | air->空气，borne->被携带（bear的过去分词），airborne->由空气携带的（cf. bear携带，seaborne海运，waterborne水传播）

quiz.question: ____ dune
quiz.explanation: 沙丘，沙丘。They climbed a tall sand dune. 他们爬上了高沙丘。 | dune->沙丘（荷兰语duin），dune->风积沙堆（cf. down低矮丘陵，downs丘陵地带，dune沙丘，barchan新月形沙丘）

quiz.question: jejune _____
quiz.explanation: 幼稚的，幼稚的想法。His jejune ideas lacked depth. 他幼稚的想法缺乏深度。 | jejunus->空腹/贫乏（拉丁），jejune->贫乏幼稚的（cf. jejunum空肠=空腹时的肠，jejune无聊，insipid乏味，naive幼稚）

quiz.question: _____ commune
quiz.explanation: 公社，农村公社。They lived in a rural commune. 他们住在农村公社。 | com->共同，mun->服务（拉丁munus），commune->共同服务=公社/沟通（cf. community社区，communicate交流，municipal市政，immunity免疫=免除服务）

quiz.question: importune __________
quiz.explanation: 强求，反复强求。Don't importune repeatedly for favors. 不要反复强求恩惠。 | im->不，portun->港口/时机（拉丁opportunus），importune->不是好时机地纠缠=强求（cf. opportunity机会，opportune适时，port港口）

quiz.question: opportune ______
quiz.explanation: 适时的，适时的时刻。It was an opportune moment to ask. 这是适时的时刻去询问。 | ob->朝向，portun->港口（拉丁portus），opportune->朝向港口=风向正好=适时的（cf. opportunity机会，port港口，import进口，export出口）

quiz.question: attune __ _____
quiz.explanation: 使协调，使协调需求。The policy should attune to needs. 政策应使协调需求。 | at->使，tune->调音，attune->使调准=使协调（cf. tune调音，tuning调谐，in tune协调，out of tune不协调）

quiz.question: anodyne ______
quiz.explanation: 无害的，无害的评论。He made an anodyne remark. 他发表了无害的评论。 | an->无，odyne->痛苦（希腊odyne），anodyne->无痛的=无害的（cf. analgesia镇痛，nostalgia怀旧=想家的痛，hedonism享乐）

quiz.question: ______ hoe
quiz.explanation: 锄头，花园锄头。Use the garden hoe to weed. 使用花园锄头除草。 | hoe->锄头（古法语houe，日耳曼语hauwan->砍），hoe->锄地工具（cf. hoe down乡村舞蹈，shoe鞋，toe脚趾）

quiz.question: ______ roe
quiz.explanation: 鱼子，鲑鱼鱼子。Salmon roe is a delicacy. 鲑鱼鱼子是美味佳肴。 | roe->鱼卵（古英语rogu），roe->鱼卵/鱼子（cf. caviar鱼子酱，spawn产卵，roe deer狍=不同词源）

quiz.question: Cape ____
quiz.explanation: 海角，合恩角。Ships rounded Cape Horn. 船只绕过合恩角。 | cape->海角（拉丁caput->头），Cape Horn->合恩角（cf. capital首都=头，captain队长，chapter章节=头，capo头目）

quiz.question: _____ agape
quiz.explanation: 张大嘴，张大嘴。He stood with mouth agape. 他张大嘴站着。 | a->处于，gape->张口（古挪威gapa），agape->张口状态=张大嘴（cf. gap缺口，gape张口，yawn打哈欠，agape也指基督教的爱）

quiz.question: shipshape _____
quiz.explanation: 井井有条的，井井有条的船舱。The shipshape cabin was tidy. 井井有条的船舱很整洁。 | ship->船，shape->形状，shipshape->像船一样整洁的（航海术语，船上一切必须整齐有序，cf. tidy整洁，orderly有序，spick and span整洁）

quiz.question: _____ jape
quiz.explanation: 戏弄，残忍的戏弄。The cruel jape hurt his feelings. 残忍的戏弄伤害了他的感情。 | jape->开玩笑（古法语japer->狗叫），jape->嘲弄玩笑（cf. joke笑话，jest玩笑，jeer嘲笑，gibe嘲讽）

quiz.question: scrape __
quiz.explanation: 勉强度日，勉强度日。They barely scrape by on minimum wage. 他们靠最低工资勉强度日。 | scrape->刮/勉强（古挪威skrapa->刮），scrape by->刮着边缘过=勉强度日（cf. scrape刮，scratch抓，scrimp节省，eek out勉强维持）

quiz.question: ________ gripe
quiz.explanation: 抱怨，不断的抱怨。His constant gripe annoyed everyone. 他不断的抱怨惹恼了每个人。 | gripe->抓住/抱怨（古英语gripan->抓），gripe->肠绞痛/抱怨（cf. grip抓握，gripe抱怨，grumble抱怨，bellyache抱怨）

quiz.question: _____ kaleidoscope
quiz.explanation: 万花筒，色彩万花筒。The color kaleidoscope created beautiful patterns. 色彩万花筒创造了美丽的图案。 | kalos->美丽（希腊），eidos->形状，scope->观察，kaleidoscope->观察美丽形状=万花筒（cf. telescope望远镜，microscope显微镜）

quiz.question: ___ stethoscope
quiz.explanation: 听诊器，使用听诊器。Doctors use stethoscope to check heartbeat. 医生使用听诊器检查心跳。 | steth->胸（希腊stethos），scope->观察，stethoscope->观察胸部声音=听诊器（cf. chest胸，scope观察，microscope显微镜）

quiz.question: ________ microscope
quiz.explanation: 显微镜，电子显微镜。Scientists used an electron microscope. 科学家使用了电子显微镜。 | micro->微小（希腊），scope->观察，microscope->观察微小物体=显微镜（cf. macroscope宏观，telescope望远镜，periscope潜望镜）

quiz.question: lope _____
quiz.explanation: 大步慢跑，大步慢跑。The horse would lope along the trail. 马会沿着小径大步慢跑。 | lope->轻快大步跑（古挪威hlaupa->跑），lope->轻快跑步（cf. elope私奔=跑走，antelope羚羊=快速奔跑，gallop疾驰）

quiz.question: interlope __ _____
quiz.explanation: 干涉，干涉贸易。Don't interlope in trade negotiations. 不要干涉贸易谈判。 | inter->之间，lope->跑（荷兰语lopen），interlope->跑进中间=干涉他人生意（cf. interloper闯入者，encroach侵占，trespass侵入）

quiz.question: ______ misanthrope
quiz.explanation: 厌世者，愤世嫉俗的厌世者。He became a bitter misanthrope. 他成了愤世嫉俗的厌世者。 | misos->恨（希腊），anthropos->人，misanthrope->恨人类的人=厌世者（cf. philanthropy慈善=爱人，misogyny厌女，anthropology人类学）

quiz.question: ______ heliotrope
quiz.explanation: 天芥菜，紫色天芥菜。Purple heliotrope flowers bloomed. 紫色天芥菜花开了。 | helios->太阳（希腊），tropos->转向，heliotrope->朝向太阳转=天芥菜/向日花（cf. heliocentric日心，helicopter直升机=螺旋太阳，solstice）

quiz.question: _____ isotope
quiz.explanation: 同位素，放射性同位素。Radio isotope are used in medicine. 放射性同位素用于医学。 | isos->相同（希腊），topos->位置，isotope->在周期表同一位置的元素=同位素（cf. isometric等距，topology拓扑，topography地形学）

quiz.question: dupe _________
quiz.explanation: 欺骗，欺骗消费者。False ads dupe consumers. 虚假广告欺骗消费者。 | dupe->被欺骗者（法语duper，可能来自huppe->戴胜鸟=易被欺骗），dupe->愚弄（cf. deceive欺骗，defraud欺诈，hoax骗局，gull欺骗）

quiz.question: ______ archetype
quiz.explanation: 原型，神话原型。The hero is a mythic archetype. 英雄是神话原型。 | arche->最初/主要（希腊），typos->印记，archetype->最初的印记=原型（cf. archive档案，archaeology考古，typical典型，prototype原型）

quiz.question: daguerreotype ________
quiz.explanation: 银版照相，银版照相肖像。The daguerreotype portrait was from 1850. 银版照相肖像来自1850年。 | Daguerre->路易·达盖尔（法国发明家，1839年发明银版摄影法），daguerreotype->银版照相（cf. eponymous以人名命名，photograph照片）

quiz.question: prototype _____
quiz.explanation: 原型，原型模型。They built a prototype model first. 他们首先制作了原型模型。 | protos->最初（希腊），typos->印记，prototype->最初的印记=原型（cf. archetype原型，stereotyping刻板印象，typical典型）

quiz.question: bare _____
quiz.explanation: 赤裸的，赤裸的事实。Just give me the bare facts. 只给我赤裸的事实。 | bare->赤裸（古英语baer），bare->不加修饰的=赤裸的（cf. barren荒芜，barely勉强，bear裸露/忍受，bare minimum最低限度）

quiz.question: scare ______
quiz.explanation: 恐吓，恐吓策略。They used scare tactic to manipulate. 他们使用恐吓策略操纵。 | scare->恐吓（古挪威skirra->驱赶），scare->惊吓（cf. scarecrow稻草人，scary可怕，scare away驱赶，fright惊吓）

quiz.question: _____ fanfare
quiz.explanation: 号角声，铜管号角声。Brass fanfare announced the arrival. 铜管号角声宣告到来。 | fanfare->号角声（法语，可能来自西班牙语fanfa->炫耀），fanfare->庄重的号角宣告（cf. fandango西班牙舞，fair集市，flourish花腔）

quiz.question: mare's ____
quiz.explanation: 母马窝（虚幻之事）。The story was a mare's nest. 这个故事是虚幻之事。 | mare->母马，nest->巢，mare's nest->母马的巢（马不筑巢=虚幻的发现，cf. wild goose chase徒劳追寻，mare mare月球海）

quiz.question: tare ______
quiz.explanation: 皮重，皮重重量。Subtract the tare weight from total. 从总重量中减去皮重重量。 | tare->容器重量（阿拉伯语tarha->去除的重量），tare->容器本身的重量（cf. net weight净重，gross weight毛重，tare皮重）

quiz.question: square ____
quiz.explanation: 公平的，公平的交易。He gave them a square deal. 他给了他们公平的交易。 | square->正方形（拉丁quadratus），square deal->公平的正方形交易（cf. square正方，squarely直接地，fair square公正，on the square公正）

quiz.question: macabre ____
quiz.explanation: 可怕的，可怕的故事。He told a macabre tale. 他讲了一个可怕的故事。 | macabre->死亡舞蹈（法语danse macabre），macabre->与死亡相关的恐怖（cf. danse macabre死亡之舞，grim黑暗，gruesome恐怖，macabre grimly）

quiz.question: _____ calibre
quiz.explanation: 口径，步枪口径。Check the rifle calibre. 检查步枪口径。 | qalib->模具（阿拉伯语），calibre->枪管直径（cf. caliber/calibre口径，calibrate校准，quality品质，caliper卡尺）

quiz.question: ____ timbre
quiz.explanation: 音色，丰富的音色。Her voice had a rich timbre. 她的声音有丰富的音色。 | tympanon->鼓（希腊），timbre->音色的特质（cf. tympanic鼓膜，timpani定音鼓，timbrel古代铃鼓，tone音调）

quiz.question: massacre _______
quiz.explanation: 屠杀，屠杀受害者。The massacre victims were remembered. 屠杀受害者被铭记。 | massacre->屠杀（法语，来源不明，可能来自Arabic mashara->嘲笑），massacre->大规模屠杀（cf. slaughter屠杀，carnage大屠杀，pogrom种族屠杀）

quiz.question: ______ lucre
quiz.explanation: 金钱，不义之财。He was motivated by filthy lucre. 他被不义之财驱使。 | lucrum->利润（拉丁），lucre->金钱/利益（贬义）（cf. lucrative有利润的，lucre钱财，filthy lucre不义之财，Judas出卖耶稣获钱）

quiz.question: adhere __ _____
quiz.explanation: 遵守，遵守规则。Everyone must adhere to rules. 每个人都必须遵守规则。 | ad->朝向，here->粘（拉丁haerere），adhere->粘向=遵守（cf. adhesive粘合，inherent内在=粘在内部，cohesion凝聚力，hesitate犹豫=粘住）

quiz.question: ________ hemisphere
quiz.explanation: 半球，北半球。Canada is in the Northern hemisphere. 加拿大位于北半球。 | hemi->半（希腊），sphaira->球，hemisphere->半球（cf. hemisphere半球，sphere球体，atmosphere大气层=气球，stratosphere平流层）

quiz.question: ______ biosphere
quiz.explanation: 生物圈，全球生物圈。The global biosphere is interconnected. 全球生物圈相互联系。 | bios->生命（希腊），sphere->球，biosphere->生命球=生物圈（cf. biology生物学，biography传记，antibiotic抗生素，atmosphere大气层）

quiz.question: _____ premiere
quiz.explanation: 首映，世界首映。The film had its world premiere. 这部电影举行了世界首映。 | premier->第一（法语，拉丁primarius），premiere->第一次公映（cf. primary主要，prime首要，primacy首位，premier首相）

quiz.question: sere ______
quiz.explanation: 枯萎的，枯萎的叶子。Sere leaves covered the ground. 枯萎的叶子覆盖着地面。 | searian->干燥（古英语searian），sere->干枯的（cf. sear烧灼，arid干旱，withered枯萎，parched干透，sere and yellow枯黄）

quiz.question: revere ___ ________
quiz.explanation: 尊敬，尊敬古人。They revere the ancients. 他们尊敬古人。 | re->再，ver->感到敬畏（拉丁vereri），revere->再度感到敬畏=尊敬（cf. reverence敬重，venerate崇拜，Revere保罗·里维尔，reverie沉思）

quiz.question: ire __ ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 愤怒，人群的愤怒。The decision aroused the ire of the crowd. 这个决定引起了人群的愤怒。 | ira->愤怒（拉丁），ire->强烈的愤怒（cf. irate愤怒的，irascible易怒的，Ireland爱尔兰=愤怒之地？，ire激怒）

quiz.question: doctrinaire ______
quiz.explanation: 教条的，教条的立场。He took a doctrinaire stance. 他采取了教条的立场。 | doctrine->教义（拉丁docere->教），doctrinaire->过分坚持教条的（cf. doctrine教义，indoctrinate灌输，doctor博士，dogmatic武断）

quiz.question: dire ____________
quiz.explanation: 可怕的，可怕的后果。The decision had dire consequences. 这个决定有可怕的后果。 | dirus->可怕的（拉丁），dire->极度可怕的（cf. dire可怕，dirge挽歌=dire+song，dread恐惧，dire straits绝境/海峡乐队）

quiz.question: _____ __ mire
quiz.explanation: 泥潭，陷入泥潭。The car was stuck in mire. 汽车陷入泥潭。 | myre->泥沼（古挪威），mire->泥沼=困境（cf. bog泥沼，marsh沼泽，quagmire泥潭，mired in陷入，admire欣赏=从泥潭中看）

quiz.question: ____ repertoire
quiz.explanation: 保留剧目，歌曲保留剧目。The singer had a varied song repertoire. 歌手有多样化的歌曲保留剧目。 | repertoire->全部储备（法语，拉丁reperire->发现），repertoire->一个演员/音乐家全部的保留节目（cf. repertory剧目，repository仓库）

quiz.question: vampire ___
quiz.explanation: 吸血鬼，吸血鬼蝙蝠。The vampire bat fed at night. 吸血鬼蝙蝠在夜间觅食。 | vampir->吸血鬼（塞尔维亚语），vampire->吸血鬼（东欧民间传说，cf. Dracula吸血鬼原型，Transylvania特兰西瓦尼亚）

quiz.question: _______ umpire
quiz.explanation: 裁判，板球裁判。The cricket umpire made the call. 板球裁判做出了判决。 | nonper->不平等的（法语，拉丁non+par），umpire->不平等的第三方=裁判（cf. impair损害，par标准，peer同等，empire帝国同根？）

quiz.question: ______ spire
quiz.explanation: 尖顶，教堂尖顶。The church spire reached high. 教堂尖顶高耸入云。 | spira->螺旋/尖塔（拉丁），spire->尖顶（cf. spiral螺旋，aspire渴望=向尖顶吸气，inspire激励，transpire发生）

quiz.question: aspire __ _________
quiz.explanation: 渴望，渴望伟大。Young athletes aspire to greatness. 年轻运动员渴望伟大。 | ad->朝向，spir->呼吸（拉丁spirare），aspire->向上呼吸=渴望（cf. inspire激励，conspire密谋，expire到期，respire呼吸）

quiz.question: conspire ________
quiz.explanation: 密谋，共同密谋。The plotters would conspire together. 阴谋者会共同密谋。 | con->共同，spir->呼吸，conspire->共同呼吸=密谋（cf. aspire渴望，inspire激励，expire到期，spirit精神=呼吸，respire呼吸）

quiz.question: ________ expire
quiz.explanation: 到期，护照到期。Your passport expire next month. 你的护照下个月到期。 | ex->向外，spir->呼吸，expire->呼气完毕=到期/死亡（cf. inspire吸气=激励，aspire渴望，conspire密谋，spirit精神=最后一口气）

quiz.question: ______ satire
quiz.explanation: 讽刺，尖刻的讽刺。He wrote biting satire. 他写了尖刻的讽刺。 | satura->混合物（拉丁，satura lanx=装满各种食物的盘），satire->讽刺性的混合作品（cf. saturate饱和，satisfy满足，satyr森林之神=讽刺性）

quiz.question: ______ attire
quiz.explanation: 服装，正式服装。Guests wore formal attire. 客人穿着正式服装。 | atirer->整理穿着（古法语，tirer->拉），attire->拉拢整理的服装（cf. tire使疲倦/轮胎，attire服装，attired穿着，raiment服装）

quiz.question: ____ ore
quiz.explanation: 矿石，铁矿石。They mined iron ore. 他们开采铁矿石。 | ora->嘴/开口（拉丁？），ore->含有金属的矿石（cf. ore矿石，iron铁，mineral矿物，smelting冶炼，ore deposit矿床）

quiz.question: bore __ _____
quiz.explanation: 使厌烦，使厌烦至死。The lecture would bore to death. 讲座会使厌烦至死。 | bore->钻孔/使厌烦（古英语borian->钻），bore->使无聊（cf. bore洞/钻孔，boring无聊，caliber口径=钻孔大小，boredom无聊）

quiz.question: _ score __
quiz.explanation: 二十，一群（二十个）。A score of years passed. 二十年过去了。 | score->二十（古挪威skor->刻痕，每二十头牲畜刻一痕），score->二十/得分（cf. score得分，settle scores清账，four score二十乘以四=80）

quiz.question: adore _ ____
quiz.explanation: 崇拜，崇拜英雄。Children adore a hero. 孩子们崇拜英雄。 | ad->朝向，or->祈祷（拉丁orare），adore->向...祈祷=崇拜（cf. pray祈祷，orator演说家，oracle神谕，oration演讲）

quiz.question: _____ chore
quiz.explanation: 家务，日常家务。Cleaning is a daily chore. 清洁是日常家务。 | chore->杂务（古英语cerr->轮到的工作），chore->乏味的家务（cf. chorus合唱团=杂务？，choreography编舞，chortle笑声）

quiz.question: ________ lore
quiz.explanation: 传说，民间传说。They studied folklore lore. 他们研究民间传说。 | lar->学习（古英语leornian），lore->知识/传说（cf. learn学习，folklore民间传说，lore传承的知识，scholar学者）

quiz.question: deplore ________
quiz.explanation: 谴责，谴责暴力。We deplore violence in all forms. 我们谴责一切形式的暴力。 | de->彻底，plor->哭泣（拉丁plorare），deplore->彻底哭泣=深切谴责（cf. implore恳求，explore探索=边哭边找，deplore强烈反对）

quiz.question: bizarre ________
quiz.explanation: 奇异的，奇异的事件。A bizarre incident occurred. 发生了奇异的事件。 | bizarre->奇怪（西班牙语bizarro->勇敢，后来意思转变），bizarre->极为奇特的（cf. weird怪异，outlandish奇异，eccentric怪僻）

quiz.question: ____ sinecure
quiz.explanation: 闲职，轻松的闲职。He had an easy sinecure. 他有轻松的闲职。 | sine->无（拉丁），cura->照料，sinecure->无需照料的职位=闲职（cf. cure治疗，curator策展人，curate教区牧师，procure获取）

quiz.question: secure _______
quiz.explanation: 获得，获得资金。They need to secure funding. 他们需要获得资金。 | se->分开，cure->照料（拉丁cura），secure->分开照料=使安全/获得（cf. insure保险，assure保证，ensure确保，cure治疗）

quiz.question: _______ epicure
quiz.explanation: 美食家，精致的美食家。He was a refined epicure. 他是精致的美食家。 | Epicurus->伊壁鸠鲁（古希腊哲学家，主张适度享乐），epicure->伊壁鸠鲁信徒=美食家（cf. epicurean伊壁鸠鲁式的，sybaritic奢华的）

quiz.question: obscure _________
quiz.explanation: 晦涩的，晦涩的引用。The text had an obscure reference. 文本有晦涩的引用。 | ob->对抗，scur->覆盖（拉丁obscurus->黑暗），obscure->被黑暗覆盖的=晦涩的（cf. secure安全，cure治疗，occur发生，recur再发生）

quiz.question: endure ________
quiz.explanation: 忍受，忍受困难。They must endure hardship. 他们必须忍受困难。 | en->使，dur->持久（拉丁durus->硬），endure->使变硬以忍受=坚持忍受（cf. durable耐用，duration持续，during期间，duress胁迫）

quiz.question: prefigure ______
quiz.explanation: 预示，预示事件。These signs prefigure events to come. 这些迹象预示即将发生的事件。 | pre->之前，figure->图形，prefigure->提前显示形状=预示（cf. figure图形，configure配置，disfigure毁容，transfigure改观）

quiz.question: ______ brochure
quiz.explanation: 小册子，旅游小册子。Pick up a travel brochure. 拿一份旅游小册子。 | brocher->缝订（法语，broche->针），brochure->用针线缝订的小册子（cf. brooch胸针，stitch缝合，pamphlet小册子，leaflet传单）

quiz.question: abjure ________
quiz.explanation: 发誓放弃，决裂，发誓放弃暴力。He would abjure violence. 他会发誓放弃暴力。 | ab->离开，jure->发誓（拉丁jurare），abjure->发誓离开=正式放弃（cf. perjure作伪证，adjure恳求，conjure施法，injury伤害）

quiz.question: perjure _______
quiz.explanation: 作伪证，作伪证。Don't perjure oneself in court. 不要在法庭上作伪证。 | per->彻底/违反，jure->发誓（拉丁jurare），perjure->违反誓言=作伪证（cf. abjure放弃，adjure恳求，jury陪审团，juror陪审员）

quiz.question: ____ lure
quiz.explanation: 诱饵，鱼诱饵。Use a bright fish lure. 使用明亮的鱼诱饵。 | loirre->鸟食（古法语，日耳曼语），lure->用鸟食引诱猎鹰=诱饵（cf. allure诱惑，lure诱饵，entice引诱，bait诱饵）

quiz.question: demure _____
quiz.explanation: 端庄的，端庄的微笑。She gave a demure smile. 她露出端庄的微笑。 | de->彻底，mur->成熟（拉丁maturus），demure->彻底成熟的=端庄含蓄的（cf. mature成熟，demure端庄，mellow成熟，demurely端庄地）

quiz.question: immure ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 监禁，终身监禁。They would immure for life. 他们会终身监禁。 | im->进入，mur->墙（拉丁murus），immure->关进墙内=监禁（cf. mural壁画，wall墙，immure关押，incarcerate监禁）

quiz.question: _______ manure
quiz.explanation: 肥料，有机肥料。Use organic manure for gardens. 花园使用有机肥料。 | manu->手（拉丁manus），ure->工作，manure->手工操作=耕作/肥料（cf. manual手动的，manufacture制造，manage管理，manicure修甲）

quiz.question: tenure _____
quiz.explanation: 终身职位，终身职位轨道。Professors aim for tenure track. 教授们以终身职位轨道为目标。 | ten->持（拉丁tenere），ure->状态，tenure->持续持有的状态=任期/终身制（cf. tenant租户，maintain维持，contain包含，sustain支撑）

quiz.question: ____ erasure
quiz.explanation: 擦除，数据擦除。Complete data erasure is important. 完全数据擦除很重要。 | e->向外，ras->刮（拉丁radere），erasure->刮掉=擦除（cf. erase抹去，razor剃刀，raze夷平，abrade磨损，abrasion磨损）

quiz.question: ensure ______
quiz.explanation: 确保，确保安全。We must ensure safety. 我们必须确保安全。 | en->使，sure->确定，ensure->使确定=确保（cf. assure保证，insure投保，secure安全，reassure再次保证）

quiz.question: _______ closure
quiz.explanation: 关闭，公司关闭。The company closure was sudden. 公司关闭很突然。 | clos->关闭（拉丁claudere），ure->状态，closure->关闭的状态（cf. close关闭，enclose围住，disclose披露，foreclose取消赎回权）

quiz.question: ______ enclosure
quiz.explanation: 围场，花园围场。They built a garden enclosure. 他们建造了花园围场。 | en->使，clos->关闭，ure->状态，enclosure->被围住的空间（cf. enclose围住，closure关闭，include包括，exclude排除）

quiz.question: ______ cynosure
quiz.explanation: 引人注目的人，社交引人注目的人。She was the social cynosure. 她是社交引人注目的人。 | Cynosura->小熊座（希腊，kyon->狗，oura->尾巴），cynosure->北极星=引人注目的中心（cf. Cynosure小熊座，Polaris北极星，center of attention）

quiz.question: _______ composure
quiz.explanation: 镇定，恢复镇定。She tried to recover composure. 她试图恢复镇定。 | com->共同，pos->放置，ure->状态，composure->把自己放置整齐=镇定（cf. compose作曲，decompose分解，compound复合，disposition性格）

quiz.question: ___ exposure
quiz.explanation: 暴露，阳光暴露。Limit sun exposure to avoid burns. 限制阳光暴露以避免晒伤。 | ex->向外，pos->放置，ure->状态，exposure->向外放置=暴露（cf. expose暴露，impose强加，dispose处置，depose罢黜）

quiz.question: overexposure ____
quiz.explanation: 过度曝光，过度曝光风险。There's an overexposure risk. 有过度曝光风险。 | over->过度，exposure->曝光，overexposure->过度曝光（cf. underexposure曝光不足，overexposed过度曝光，saturation饱和）

quiz.question: assure _______
quiz.explanation: 保证，保证成功。Hard work will assure success. 努力工作会保证成功。 | as->朝向，sure->确定（拉丁securus），assure->使确定=保证（cf. ensure确保，insure投保，secure安全，reassure再次保证）

quiz.question: _________ caricature
quiz.explanation: 漫画，政治漫画。The newspaper ran a political caricature. 报纸刊登了政治漫画。 | caricare->夸大（意大利语，拉丁carrus->车），caricature->夸大的肖像=漫画（cf. cargo货物，charge负担，car车，career职业）

quiz.question: ligature ____
quiz.explanation: 结扎线，结扎线痕迹。The ligature mark was visible. 结扎线痕迹可见。 | lig->绑（拉丁ligare），ure->状态，ligature->绑扎的结=结扎线（cf. ligament韧带，liable有责任的，rely依赖，ally盟友=绑在一起）
